unableToLoadUsers: Unable to load users. Please sign in again.
unableToLoadRiskSignals: Unable to load risk signals. Check your connection or sign in again.
unableToLoadEvent: Unable to load event. Check your connection or sign in again.
unableToLoadSettings: Unable to load settings. Please try again or sign in again.
unableToLoadEvents: Unable to load events. Check your connection or sign in again.
unableToLoadReports: Unable to load reports. Please try again or sign in again.
unableToLoadReport: Unable to load this report. Please try again or sign in again.
unableToLoadDuplicates: Unable to load duplicate reports. Please try again or sign in again.
unableToLoadNotifications: Unable to load notifications right now.
sessionExpiredOrDenied: Session expired or access denied. The access token may have expired (default 15 min). Sign in again.
apiConnectionFailed: Cannot reach API from the server. Confirm https://api.chisto.mk is reachable (ALB security group allows 443 from the internet). In Vercel, set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL and redeploy; if the build still lacks it, add SERVER_API_BASE_URL=https://api.chisto.mk (server runtime, same origin).
apiServerError: API server error. Please try again later.
settingsLoadFailed: Something went wrong while loading settings. Please retry, or return to the dashboard.
segmentDefaultMessage: We could not load this workspace. Retry or return to the overview.
validationFailed: Validation failed. Adjust the fields and try again.
eventEndSameDay: Event end must be on the same calendar day as the start.
eventEndBeforeMidnight: Event end must not be after 23:59 on the start day.
unsavedChangesGuard: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?
somethingWentWrongTryAgain: Something went wrong. Please try again.
notSignedIn: Not signed in. Open the app from the login page and try again.
sessionMissingOrExpired: Your session is missing or expired. Sign out and sign in again, then reload.
apiReturnedError: The API returned an error. Try again in a moment.
couldNotReachApi: Could not reach the API. Check your connection and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL.
